learning.concept: Coding allows us to build real-world systems and automate work.
learning.explanation: From your microwave to rockets in space, everything is powered by code. Learning how it works gives you the power to create your own digital world.

analogy.title: Building Machines
analogy.body:
Coding is like building mechanical systems that work for you.

👉 Robots, apps, games, and security are all machines built with code.

practice.a: To provide instructions on how to interact with users and data.
No, because a machine needs to be explicitly told what to do.
Yes, coding is a high-demand skill across almost every modern industry.
